basic_details.job_title: CMO Ballia District Information Systems Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical Office Ballia (CMO Ballia) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 District Information Systems Manager (DISM) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 22-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech in Computer Sc./IT/Math & Computing / Data Science/MCA with minimum 5 years experience
qualification.details: District Information Systems Manager (DISM): B. Tech in Computer Science/IT/Math & Computing / Data Science/MCA with a minimum of 5 years of experience in implementing and managing information systems. Desirable: Experience in insurance industry IT system maintenance and familiarity with insurance enrolment and claims IT Systems.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ballia.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMO Ballia District Information Systems Manager (DISM) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMO Ballia Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CMO Ballia District Information Systems Manager (DISM) Job 2026 Notification PDF

Tech in Computer Science/IT/Math & Computing / Data Science/MCA with a minimum of 5 years of experience in implementing and managing information systems. Desirable: Experience in insurance industry IT system maintenance and familiarity with insurance enrolment and claims IT Systems.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.ballia.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMO Ballia District Information Systems Manager (DISM) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMO Ballia DISM recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Information Systems Manager (DISM) post is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the DISM post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech in Computer Science/IT/Math & Computing / Data Science or MCA, along with a minimum of 5 years of experience in implementing and managing information systems.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the District Information Systems Manager (DISM) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the District Information Systems Manager (DISM) post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the DISM role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by sending their application form to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of District Information Systems Manager (DISM).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DISM post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of District Information Systems Manager (DISM) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of CMO Ballia, which is www.ballia.nic.in.
